overall.description: A bus simulator game showing a first-person perspective from the driver's seat during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates through urban streets, makes a right turn at an intersection, stops at a bus stop to pick up a passenger, and continues through the city with active windshield wipers and wet road conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with residential buildings

agents.ego_description: driving straight through wet city streets with windshield wipers active, maintaining steady speed behind other vehicles

side mirror showing bus exterior and street behind
side mirror showing bus exterior and street behind

segments.scene_description: The bus drives straight along a rain-soaked urban arterial road lined with apartment buildings and trees. The windshield wipers work continuously to clear the heavy rain as the bus follows other vehicles through the wet streets.

events.description: bus slows and stops at intersection waiting for crossing traffic and pedestrians
bus initiates right turn maneuver at the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersection, slowing for traffic, then executing a right turn onto a new street

notable_agents.action: white car waiting at the intersection for the bus to complete its turn

entered.detail: zebra crossing lines painted on the road surface at the intersection
traffic signal visible above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches a wide urban intersection, slows to wait for traffic, then executes a right turn. The scene opens up to show crosswalks and traffic signals before revealing a new street lined with commercial shop fronts.

events.description: bus pulls over to the curb and stops at designated bus stop to pick up passenger

agents.ego_description: pulling over to the bus stop, opening doors to allow passenger to board, then preparing to depart

notable_agents.action: person standing at bus stop shelter waiting to board, then entering the bus through the front door

entered.detail: covered waiting area with glass panels on the sidewalk
large display windows of commercial establishments reflecting the wet street
person with light-colored jacket standing under the bus stop shelter

segments.scene_description: Driving along a commercial street lined with shops, the bus pulls over to a bus stop where a pedestrian is waiting. The bus stops at the shelter, the passenger boards, and the bus prepares to continue its route through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban mixed commercial and residential street

agents.ego_description: accelerating away from the bus stop and continuing along the wet city street, navigating through light traffic

entered.detail: buildings combining ground floor shops with upper floor residential units
traffic signs and street signs visible along the right side of the road
cars parked along the left curb of the street

segments.scene_description: After departing the bus stop, the bus continues along a mixed-use urban street with parked cars and various buildings. The heavy rain persists as the bus navigates through the city, passing road signs and maintaining steady progress along the wet asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from the driver's seat as a bus navigates a rain-drenched city, moving from a residential arterial road into a commercial district. It begins by driving straight past apartment buildings and trees, with windshield wipers working steadily to clear the heavy downpour. As the bus approaches a wide intersection, the view opens up to reveal traffic signals and crosswalks before the vehicle executes a right turn onto a street lined with commercial shop fronts. The scene then shifts as the bus pulls over at a sheltered stop to board a waiting passenger, momentarily pausing the forward motion. Finally, the bus departs the stop and continues along a mixed-use urban street, passing parked cars and road signs while maintaining steady progress through the persistent rain.
